metadata.description: A collection of developer productivity plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Code review skill that checks for bugs, security issues, and best practices

plugins.name: explain-code
plugins.description: Explains code in plain language with architecture diagrams and complexity analysis

plugins.name: test-gen
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive test suites for your code with edge cases and mocks

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Suggests and applies refactoring patterns to improve code quality

plugins.name: graphite-context
plugins.description: Detects Graphite and injects stack context at session start

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Iteratively runs codex exec review, evaluates issues, fixes valid ones, and repeats until clean

plugins.name: codex-reviewed-plan
plugins.description: Drafts an implementation plan, then iteratively reviews it with codex exec and refines until no actionable issues remain
